MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-19-2022 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANNE ONGKO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT PARTIALLY GRANTS AND DENIES THE APPLICATION. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS, FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT AND COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT ONGKO, ANNE
